a1.title: Field guide to this garden
a1.note: Distinguishes a flagged task (drop it if deferred too long, per c2's own new discipline) from a flagged condition (a stalled plot, a mid-thought time-out) that no visit can manufacture just to stop naming it.

d4.title: The house that forgets its architect
d4.note: A twelfth room, the threshing floor, branches off the nursery: the hedge line's trail that stopped at nothing resumes here with no walkable path between, and a fourth harvest room joins the grove/cellar/basket without naming a tender. Twelve rooms — bloom.

a4.title: Erosion
a4.note: epoch-10: band four now gets its own matching zigzag (shifted +14, uniform-thickness dark shadow strip between), closing the band-four-visibility thread flagged since epoch 7 — band three's four bites finally read top-to-bottom in the full composite, not just in isolation.

b3.title: Undersea — a 3D swimming simulation
b3.note: A second debris trail — barrels and broken planks, shrinking and scattering with distance — now leads away from the wreck's stern, closing out all three of visit 5's interior-life ideas (bioluminescence, sheltering fish, this trail).

c2.title: The mistranslation engine
c2.note: Ossane's oldest open thread resolved: the willful/willless verb split holds once the river (personified with will since the source) is recognized as the diary's other actor, distinct from the never-agentive bridge and kettle.
